name: Commonwealth Bank Of Australia.
analysis: CBA has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 12% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Trade idea: entry A$164.2300, stop A$154.8558, target A$185.5900 (2.28:1) — then trail it.
